root.sql: SELECT pka_com_function.fp_get_member_name( sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no ) AS membername , sc_mem_m_share_mem.share_stock, ''as calint_amt, pka_com_function.fp_get_thaidate( sc_fin_m_constant.finance_date ,'SD MONTH YYYY') as fin_date, sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no, sc_lon_m_loan_card.principal_balance, sc_lon_m_loan_card.loan_contract_no, sc_lon_m_rule.loan_type, sc_lon_m_rule.loan_type_description, sc_mem_m_member_own_info.other_saving, sc_mem_m_ucf_othersaving.saving_name ,pka_lon_intsrv.fp_calint(sc_lon_m_loan_card.loan_contract_no,to_date( sc_fin_m_constant.finance_date ,'dd/mm/yyyy'),sc_lon_m_loan_card.principal_balance,to_date(sc_lon_m_loan_card.last_calcint_date,'dd/mm/yyyy')) AS calint_amt FROM sc_mem_m_membership_registered, sc_mem_m_share_mem, sc_fin_m_constant, sc_lon_m_loan_card, sc_lon_m_rule, sc_mem_m_member_own_info, sc_mem_m_ucf_othersaving WHERE ( sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no = sc_mem_m_share_mem.membership_no ) AND ( sc_mem_m_member_own_info.membership_no = sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no ) and ( sc_mem_m_ucf_othersaving.other_saving_member = sc_mem_m_member_own_info.other_saving) AND ( sc_mem_m_share_mem.membership_no = sc_lon_m_loan_card.membership_no ) AND ( sc_lon_m_loan_card.loan_type = sc_lon_m_rule.loan_type ) AND ( sc_lon_m_loan_card.principal_balance > 0 OR sc_lon_m_loan_card.interest_arrear > 0 ) /*WHERE*/ order by sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no
